_meta.description: Three standardised Awakli anime shot archetypes generated via Stage 1 pipeline (Flux). Every provider generates these same three 10-second clips for apples-to-apples comparison.

shots.name: Establishing Shot — Neo-Kyoto Bayfront at Dusk
shots.prompt: Wide establishing shot of a futuristic cyberpunk Japanese bay city at dusk. A sweeping panoramic view shows a crescent-shaped harbour with glowing neon-lit skyscrapers reflected in dark water. Traditional three-tier pagoda silhouette visible among the towers. Heavy rain falls, creating streaks of light against holographic billboards. Wet streets reflect pink, cyan, and amber neon. A lone cargo drone crosses the sky trailing navigation lights. Cinematic 2D anime style, dramatic lighting, atmospheric perspective, no characters visible.
shots.notes: Low complexity, ambient motion only (rain, neon flicker, drone). Tests baseline video generation quality and cost. Reference image is Awakli Stage 1 output.

shots.name: Dialogue Close-Up — Ren and Mira Rooftop Confrontation
shots.prompt: Medium shot on a traditional Japanese rooftop at dusk. Two anime characters face each other in tense confrontation. Left: Ren, a 17-year-old male with black undercut hair with crimson red streaks on the right side, emerald green eyes, a thin scar on his left cheek, wearing a black gakuran school uniform with glowing cyan circuit embroidery and a katana at his left hip. Right: Mira, a 16-year-old female with long silver-white hair with cerulean blue tips, a small braid at her right temple, gold and amber eyes, wearing a navy sailor school uniform with a red neckerchief, her left arm is a mechanical prosthetic with amber light-lines. Cyberpunk city skyline in background with a pagoda visible over Mira's right shoulder. Cinematic 2D anime style, dramatic dusk lighting.

dialogue.text: I finally understand why you came back.

shots.notes: The critical test. Requires reference image + dialogue audio. Tests lipsync, character fidelity, and voice integration. Reference image is Awakli Stage 1 output with both characters.

shots.name: Action — Ren's Katana Strike vs Mira's Shield Block
shots.prompt: Close-up dynamic action shot on a rooftop at night. Ren swings his katana with an ice-blue glowing blade in a diagonal slash from upper-left. Mira's left mechanical arm has hardened into a rectangular shield with amber glow, blocking the strike. Cyan and amber sparks explode at the impact point. Radial manga speed lines emanate from the clash. A shockwave ring expands outward. Background is near-monochrome cyberpunk city, desaturated to emphasise the foreground action. Ren's crimson hair streaks trail behind him. Mira's silver-blue hair lifts from the shockwave. Cinematic 2D anime style, extreme dynamic composition.
shots.notes: High complexity, fast motion, two characters, VFX. Tests motion handling, multi-character scenes, and particle effects. Reference image is Awakli Stage 1 output with Shot 2 as character reference.
